title: Sort topics by severity and hide configuration block

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting to sort topics by severity (hot -> warm -> cold, and then by frequency) and hiding the raw Configuration JSON block by default.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: I've added sorting to the topics so they appear in order of severity (cold -> warm -> hot), matching the request to put the worst ones (hot) at the bottom.
